changelog: Auto-Populated Details: The Activation Window now automatically populates your Machine ID and required details during a first-time installation on a non-licensed machine—no more manual copying and pasting.
Flexible Activation Channels: Send activation requests instantly via your preferred tool:
WhatsApp: Launches WhatsApp Desktop or opens WhatsApp Web.
Email: Opens your local mail client (via mailto:) or routes to a pre-composed message in Gmail/Outlook Web.
Smart Fallback: Automatically copies your details (Email + Machine ID) to your clipboard if you prefer manual pasting.
Notification Log: Access a persistent log of your notifications by clicking the new bell icon next to the 🌓 Mode selector in the top-right bar.
Under-the-Hood Optimizations: General bug fixes and performance tweaks for a faster, more stable experience.
Case Converter (Ledgers/Items): Batch convert the casing (UPPER, lower, or Title Case) of Ledgers and Stock Items in Tally Prime.
Smart Address Book: View, filter, and export party address books, or print mailing envelopes.
Voucher Numbering & Type Tools: Bulk change voucher types or convert numbering settings from Auto to Manual while preserving your existing numbers.
Bulk PDF Invoice Generator: Fetch sales vouchers, set custom headers/footers, add diagonal watermarks, and batch export them as individual or merged PDFs.
Universal PDF Export: Right-click on any data grid or table (ttk.Treeview) anywhere in the application to access the new Export to PDF... option directly from the context menu.
